metadata.siteDescription: WORLD IAC ASIA Portal - Managing members, judge profiles, and regional organization network across Asia.

memberApp.label: Join World IAC Asia
memberApp.title: Membership Application
memberApp.desc: Fill in the form below to submit your application to become a World IAC Asia member. The management board will review and respond within 7 business days.
memberApp.experiencePlaceholder: Describe your culinary experience, positions held, achievements...
memberApp.notice: Your application will be sent to the World IAC Asia Management Board for review and approval. We will contact you via the phone number or email provided.
memberApp.successDesc: The World IAC Asia Management Board will review your application and contact you within 7 business days.

presidentAsia.label: WORLD IAC ASIA
presidentAsia.title: President of World IAC Asia
presidentAsia.p1: A celebrated culinary figure, educator, and strategic consultant, Mr. Tran Le Thanh Thien wields substantial influence across the domestic and international F&B landscapes. In his esteemed roles as President of World IAC Asia and Founder of the Asia Culinary and Baking Academy, he acts as a vital cultural bridge and is frequently spotlighted as an International Judge and Organising Committee Chair at world-class arenas, including Master Chef of Foodex 2026 and the World Bakery and Confectionery Competition 2026. His visionary approach to global standardization, paired with his dedication to mentorship, has solidified his status as a trailblazer redefining excellence for the next generation of hospitality talents.

secretary.label: WORLD IAC ASIA
secretary.title: General Secretary of World IAC Asia
secretary.bio: Chef Trinh Le Thanh, General Secretary of World IAC Asia, is a celebrated culinary figure, master artisan, and visionary educator renowned for her profound expertise in Vietnamese pastry arts and Chinese gastronomy. A driving force within the international F&B landscape, she is deeply committed to empowering global culinary communities and fostering strategic industry growth. Serving as an esteemed International Judge and Deputy Chair of the Organizing Committee for world-class arenas—including Master Chef of Foodex 2026 and the World Bakery and Confectionery Competition 2026—Chef Trinh Le Thanh acts as a vital cultural bridge and mentor, dedicated to advancing professional standards and inspiring the next generation of hospitality talents to excel globally.

president.label: WORLD IAC
president.title: Global President
president.role: World President — World IAC / Global President
president.p1: Chef Simone Falcini serves as World President of the World Independent Association of Chefs (World IAC), leading the global vision to connect professional chefs worldwide.
president.quote: We want to be a family, to share, to rejoice, and to be close, both in good times and in bad. Our philosophy is to always look to the future and to solutions for the common good. Personally, I like to think of myself as everyone's president, and I am available to professionals and junior chefs to create a strong and solid bond that can take deep root. I look forward to seeing you at WORLD IAC.
president.ctaDesc: Explore our panel of international culinary experts who set and uphold the gold standard for the F&B industry across Asia.

home.heroSubtitle: Asia's leading professional culinary organization network — managing members, judges, and international culinary accreditation standards.
home.iacIntroDesc: Latest activities, events, and news from World IAC Asia.
home.missionP1: World IAC Asia connects culinary organizations across 10 Asian countries, promoting quality standards, professional training, and outstanding contributions in the F&B industry.
home.missionP2: We provide a transparent platform for members, judges, and partners to grow together and elevate Asian culinary brands on the global stage.
home.benefit1Desc: Affirm your quality and creativity in the culinary industry.
home.benefit2Desc: Build a strong personal and business brand.
home.benefit3Desc: Attract customers and expand collaboration opportunities.
home.benefit4Desc: Elevate your leading position in the F&B industry.

members.title: Members Directory
members.subtitle: Search members by name, code, or country. Expired unpaid members are blurred with a red badge.
members.applyDesc1: World IAC Asia welcomes chefs, culinary professionals and F&B organizations across Asia who wish to become official members.
members.applyDesc2: Applications are reviewed and approved by the Management Board. Only candidates meeting World IAC standards will be accepted.
members.step1: Fill in your information and upload your CV.
members.step2: The World IAC Asia Management Board reviews within 7 business days.
members.step3: Receive the result notification via phone or email.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or member code...

activities.title: Activities
activities.subtitle: Follow activities, events, and programs from World IAC Asia.
activities.question: Where are IAC Asia-wide activities posted?
activities.answer: News, events, and activities from World IAC Asia are updated in the News section, through partner recognition channels, and on the IAC network map for each member country.
activities.channelMapDesc: Activities and representative organizations by country.

newsPage.title: News
newsPage.subtitle: Latest news, events, and highlights from World IAC Asia.

nationalPresidents.label: Leadership
nationalPresidents.title: National Presidents
nationalPresidents.subtitle: World IAC leadership across Asian member countries.
nationalPresidents.vietnamBio: A celebrated culinary figure, educator, and strategic consultant, Mr. Tran Le Thanh Thien wields substantial influence across domestic and international F&B landscapes. As President of World IAC Asia and Founder of the Asia Culinary and Baking Academy, he serves as a vital cultural bridge and International Judge at world-class culinary arenas.
nationalPresidents.philippinesBio: Chef Arwin "Zek" Gragasin's culinary journey began with a passion for Asian cuisine and Filipino heritage. He is President of World IAC Philippines and founder of the Upland Sierra Madre Chef Organisation, specializing in Asian fusion and promoting Filipino culinary heritage globally.
nationalPresidents.singaporeBio: Chef Judy Koh is the President of World IAC Singapore, a culinary educator and internationally recognized pastry expert. She plays a vital role in elevating pastry standards and developing young chefs in Singapore.
nationalPresidents.indonesiaBio: Chef Roy Lesmana, President of World IAC Indonesia, is an experienced chef and trainer in Indonesia's F&B industry. He promotes professional standards and connects the culinary community across the region.
nationalPresidents.indiaBio: Chef Kaninika, President of World IAC India, is a culinary expert and educator with significant influence in India's F&B community. She plays a key role in developing judge standards and professional training.
nationalPresidents.sriLankaTitle: President of World IAC Sri Lanka
nationalPresidents.sriLankaBio: Chef Chamodh Peiris, President of World IAC Sri Lanka, is renowned for the 150.919-meter Swiss Roll record and serves as Head of the Youth Chefs' Club of Ceylon. He champions creativity and youth chef development in Sri Lanka.
nationalPresidents.southKoreaTitle: President of World IAC South Korea
nationalPresidents.southKoreaBio: Chef Dong Yeon Park, President of World IAC South Korea, is a culinary expert and community leader. He contributes to elevating professional standards and connecting Korean cuisine with the World IAC network.
nationalPresidents.malaysiaBio: Chef William Surianath, President of World IAC Malaysia, is an experienced chef and trainer in the hospitality industry. He promotes career development and judge standardization in Malaysia.
nationalPresidents.taiwanBio: Chef Ho Chen Hsiung, President of World IAC Taiwan, is a culinary expert with extensive experience in training and organizing international culinary events. He connects Taiwan's chef community with World IAC.
